# Purpose
This JSON file defines metadata for a software application. It includes a unique identifier (`uuid`), short and long names (`shortName` and `longName`), and the company name (`companyName`). The version information is specified with `versionCode` and `versionLabel`. The `watchapp` object indicates that the application is not a watchface. The `resources` object includes an empty `media` array, indicating no media resources are associated with the application.
